title: Bounded Bodies, JSON, Forms, Multipart Uploads, and Validation · Execution Trace: Validation Field Domain
summary: A create endpoint trusts Content-Length, decodes one JSON value but ignores trailing data, accepts unknown fields, buffers uploads in memory, and reports internal parser errors to clients. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsgo validation field domain increment in bounded request decoding and validation pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate transport shape validation from domain invariants, normalize only defined values, accumulate safe field errors, and preserve causality internally.
Decode exactly one JSON value, reject trailing content and unknown fields when the contract is closed, and distinguish syntax, type, and size failures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
